data.name: ACCOUNT_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_MASTER_FORBIDDEN
data.value: The MASTER subscription is reserved for CLARI operators.

data.name: ACTIVE_COMPANY_ARCHIVE_FORBIDDEN
data.value: Switch to another active company before archiving the current active company.

data.name: ACTIVE_COMPANY_SWITCH_FORBIDDEN
data.value: The requested company cannot become the active company.

data.name: AUDIT_LOG_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested audit log entry was not found.

data.name: BEHAVIOR_LEVEL_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected behavior level could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: BEHAVIOR_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected behavior could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_ADDON_ALREADY_ACTIVE
data.value: The commercial addon is already active.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_ADDON_ALREADY_INACTIVE
data.value: The commercial addon is already inactive.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_ADDON_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another commercial addon already uses the requested code.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_ADDON_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access commercial addon administration.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_ADDON_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested commercial addon could not be found.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_PLAN_ALREADY_ACTIVE
data.value: The commercial plan is already active.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_PLAN_ALREADY_INACTIVE
data.value: The commercial plan is already inactive.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_PLAN_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another commercial plan already uses the requested code.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_PLAN_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access commercial plan administration.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_PLAN_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested commercial plan could not be found.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_PLAN_SYSTEM_INACTIVATION_FORBIDDEN
data.value: System plans cannot be inactivated.

data.name: COMMERCIAL_PLAN_SYSTEM_RENAME_FORBIDDEN
data.value: System plans cannot change code or name.

data.name: COMPANY_ALREADY_ACTIVE
data.value: The company is already active.

data.name: COMPANY_ALREADY_ARCHIVED
data.value: The company is already archived.

data.name: COMPANY_LIMIT_REACHED
data.value: The current account cannot create additional active companies.

data.name: COMPANY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested company could not be found.

data.name: COMPANY_OWNERSHIP_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to manage this company.

data.name: COMPANY_PREFERENCES_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access company preferences.

data.name: COMPANY_PREFERENCE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The company preferences could not be found.

data.name: COMPANY_REACTIVATION_LIMIT_REACHED
data.value: The current account cannot reactivate this company because the active company limit has been reached.

data.name: COMPANY_TYPE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected company type could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: COMPETENCY_CONDUCT_DUPLICATE
data.value: A conduct already exists for the same competency, type, level and description.

data.name: COMPETENCY_CONDUCT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The competency conduct could not be found.

data.name: COMPETENCY_FRAMEWORK_EXPORT_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported export format.

data.name: COMPETENCY_FRAMEWORK_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access competency framework administration.

data.name: COMPETENCY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected competency could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: COMPETENCY_TYPE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected competency type could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT
data.value: The resource was modified by another request. Refresh and try again.

data.name: COST_CENTERS_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access cost center administration.

data.name: COST_CENTER_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another cost center already uses the requested code.

data.name: COST_CENTER_EXPORT_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported export format.

data.name: COST_CENTER_IN_USE
data.value: The cost center cannot be inactivated because it is used by active organization units or position slots.

data.name: COST_CENTER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The cost center could not be found.

data.name: DEFAULT_GROUP_PROTECTED
data.value: The default location group is protected and cannot be renamed, recoded or inactivated.

data.name: FIELD_EDIT_FORBIDDEN
data.value: One or more submitted fields cannot be modified by the current user.

data.name: FREQUENCY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested frequency could not be found.

data.name: FUNCTIONAL_AREA_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected functional area could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: INTERNAL_CATALOG_CONTEXT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested internal catalog context is not supported.

data.name: INTERNAL_CATALOG_CREATE_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: The requested internal catalog does not allow value creation.

data.name: INTERNAL_CATALOG_CURRENT_USER_INVALID
data.value: The current user context is invalid.

data.name: INTERNAL_CATALOG_CURRENT_USER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The current user could not be resolved.

data.name: INTERNAL_CATALOG_KEY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested internal catalog is not supported.

data.name: INTERNAL_CATALOG_SIMILAR_VALUE_CONFLICT
data.value: The value is too similar to an existing catalog value.

data.name: INVALID_CURRENT_USER
data.value: Current user context is invalid.

data.name: JOB_CATALOG_INLINE_CREATE_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to create catalog items inline.

data.name: JOB_CATALOG_ITEM_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another catalog item already uses the requested code for this category.

data.name: JOB_CATALOG_ITEM_INACTIVE
data.value: The selected catalog item is inactive.

data.name: JOB_CATALOG_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The job catalog item could not be found.

data.name: JOB_PROFILES_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access job profile administration.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another job profile already uses the requested code.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_COMPETENCY_MATRIX_CONFLICT
data.value: The requested competency matrix change is not valid for the current state.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_DEPENDENCY_CYCLE
data.value: This change cannot be saved because it would make the selected job profiles depend on each other in a circular way. Review the reporting profile and dependent positions, then try again.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_EXPORT_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported export format. Supported values are json and csv.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The job profile could not be found.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_ORG_UNIT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected organization unit could not be found.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_ORG_UNIT_REQUIRED
data.value: An organization unit is required for the job profile.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_PUBLISH_REQUIREMENTS_MISSING
data.value: The job profile does not meet the minimum requirements to be published.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_REPORTS_TO_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected reporting profile could not be found.

data.name: JobProfileBenefit.NameRequired
data.value: A name is required for the benefit.

data.name: JobProfileCompetency.NameRequired
data.value: A name is required for the competency.

data.name: JobProfileDependentPosition.NotFound
data.value: The dependent position could not be found.

data.name: JobProfileTraining.NameRequired
data.value: A name is required for the training.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_STATE_CONFLICT
data.value: The requested action is not allowed for the current profile state.

data.name: JobProfileWorkingCondition.NameRequired
data.value: A name is required for the working condition.

data.name: JobProfileWorkingCondition.NotFound
data.value: The working condition could not be found.

data.name: LAST_ACTIVE_LEVEL_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one active location level must remain available.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVES_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access legal representative administration.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE_ACTIVE_MIN_REQUIRED
data.value: The company must have at least one active legal representative.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE_DOCUMENT_CONFLICT
data.value: Another legal representative already uses the requested document.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE_EFFECTIVE_DATES_INVALID
data.value: The effective date range is invalid.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE_EXPORT_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported export format.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The legal representative could not be found.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE_PRIMARY_CONFLICT
data.value: Only one active primary legal representative is allowed per company.

data.name: LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE_STATE_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: The requested operation is not allowed for the current legal representative state.

data.name: LOCATIONS_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access location administration.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another location group already uses the requested code.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_CYCLE_DETECTED
data.value: The requested move would create a cycle in the location group tree.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_HAS_ACTIVE_CHILDREN
data.value: The location group cannot be inactivated because it still has active child groups.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_HAS_ACTIVE_WORK_CENTERS
data.value: The location group cannot be inactivated because it still has active work centers.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_INACTIVE
data.value: The selected location group is inactive.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_INVALID_PARENT
data.value: The selected parent group is not valid for the requested level.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_LEVEL_NOT_ALLOWED_FOR_WORK_CENTER
data.value: The selected location group level cannot host work centers.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The location group could not be found.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_PARENT_INACTIVE
data.value: The selected parent group is inactive.

data.name: LOCATION_GROUP_PARENT_REQUIRED
data.value: A parent group is required for non-root levels.

data.name: LOCATION_HIERARCHY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The location hierarchy configuration could not be found.

data.name: LOCATION_LEVEL_ALLOWS_WORK_CENTERS_IN_USE
data.value: The location level cannot be changed because active work centers depend on it.

data.name: LOCATION_LEVEL_HAS_ACTIVE_GROUPS
data.value: The location level cannot be inactivated because it still has active groups.

data.name: LOCATION_LEVEL_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The location level could not be found.

data.name: LOCATION_LEVEL_ORDER_CONFLICT
data.value: Another location level already uses the requested level order.

data.name: LOCATION_LEVEL_REQUIRED_ACTIVE
data.value: Required location levels must remain active.

data.name: LOCATION_SINGLE_LEVEL_REQUIRES_ONE_ACTIVE_LEVEL
data.value: Single-level hierarchies require exactly one active level.

data.name: OCCUPATIONAL_PYRAMID_LEVEL_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another occupational pyramid level already uses the requested code.

data.name: OCCUPATIONAL_PYRAMID_LEVEL_IN_USE
data.value: The occupational pyramid level cannot be inactivated while it has active usage.

data.name: OCCUPATIONAL_PYRAMID_LEVEL_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The occupational pyramid level could not be found.

data.name: OCCUPATIONAL_PYRAMID_LEVEL_ORDER_CONFLICT
data.value: Another occupational pyramid level already uses the requested level order.

data.name: ORG_STRUCTURE_CATALOG_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another catalog item already uses the requested code.

data.name: ORG_STRUCTURE_CATALOG_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access organization structure catalogs.

data.name: ORG_STRUCTURE_CATALOG_IN_USE
data.value: The catalog item cannot be inactivated while it is in use.

data.name: ORG_STRUCTURE_CATALOG_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested organization structure catalog item could not be found.

data.name: ORG_UNITS_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access organization unit administration.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another organization unit already uses the requested code.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_COST_CENTER_INVALID
data.value: The selected cost center code does not exist or is inactive for the company.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_CYCLE_DETECTED
data.value: The requested move would create a cycle in the organization unit tree.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_DEPTH_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
data.value: The requested hierarchy depth exceeds the maximum supported levels.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_HAS_ACTIVE_CHILDREN
data.value: The organization unit cannot be inactivated because it still has active child units.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The organization unit could not be found.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_PARENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected parent organization unit could not be found.

data.name: ORG_UNIT_TYPE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected org unit type could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: PERSONNEL_CUSTOM_DATA_INVALID
data.value: The custom data payload is invalid.

data.name: PERSONNEL_CUSTOM_FIELD_DEFINITION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The custom field definition could not be found.

data.name: PERSONNEL_CUSTOM_FIELD_KEY_CONFLICT
data.value: Another custom field definition already uses the requested key.

data.name: PERSONNEL_EDUCATION_CATALOGS_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access personnel education catalogs.

data.name: PERSONNEL_EDUCATION_CATALOG_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another personnel education catalog item already uses the requested code.

data.name: PERSONNEL_EDUCATION_CATALOG_ITEM_IN_USE
data.value: The personnel education catalog item is in use and cannot be inactivated.

data.name: PERSONNEL_EDUCATION_CATALOG_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested personnel education catalog item could not be found.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILES_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access personnel file administration.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_DOCUMENT_DATES_INVALID
data.value: Document loan and return dates are invalid.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_DOCUMENT_CONTENT_TYPE_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: The document file type is not supported.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_DOCUMENT_FILE_REQUIRED
data.value: A document file is required.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_DOCUMENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The personnel file document could not be found.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_DOCUMENT_STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: Personnel file document storage is not configured.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_DOCUMENT_TOO_LARGE
data.value: The document file exceeds the maximum allowed size.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_EFFECTIVE_DATES_INVALID
data.value: The date range is invalid.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_EXPORT_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported export format.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_FAMILY_MEMBER_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: Family member conditional fields are invalid.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_FINALIZE_ONLY_EMPLOYEE
data.value: Only employee personnel files can be finalized.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_FINALIZE_REQUIRES_INSTITUTIONAL_EMAIL
data.value: An institutional email is required to finalize the personnel file.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_FINALIZE_REQUIRES_POSITION_SLOT
data.value: An assigned position slot is required to finalize the personnel file.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_FINALIZE_REQUIRES_POSITION_SLOT_ROLE
data.value: The assigned position slot must have a valid role configured before finalizing the personnel file.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_IDENTIFICATION_CONFLICT
data.value: Another personnel file already uses the requested identification.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_LINKED_USER_CONFLICT
data.value: The institutional email is already linked to a different personnel file.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The personnel file could not be found.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_PROVISIONING_FIELDS_LOCKED
data.value: Assigned position slot and institutional email cannot be changed after completion.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_RECORD_TYPE_TRANSITION_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Personnel file record type transitions are not allowed in this module.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_STATE_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: The requested operation is not allowed for the current personnel file state.

data.name: PLATFORM_ACCESS_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access platform backoffice administration.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_ALREADY_ACTIVE
data.value: The requested add-on is already active for the company.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_CHANGE_CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Only scheduled add-on changes that are still pending can be cancelled.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN_PAST
data.value: The requested add-on effective date cannot be in the past.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE_REQUIRED
data.value: A future effective date is required for the selected add-on change mode.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_CHANGE_INVALID_ACTION
data.value: The requested add-on change action is invalid.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_CHANGE_INVALID_MODE
data.value: The requested add-on change mode is invalid.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_CHANGE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested company add-on change could not be found.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_CHANGE_REASON_REQUIRED
data.value: A reason code is required for the requested add-on change.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_FORBIDDEN_FOR_FREE_PLAN
data.value: Companies using the FREE plan cannot acquire commercial add-ons.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_INACTIVE
data.value: Only active commercial add-ons can be assigned to companies.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_NOT_ACTIVE
data.value: Only active company add-ons can be deactivated.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested commercial add-on could not be found.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_PENDING_CONFLICT
data.value: The company already has a scheduled change pending for the requested add-on.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ADDON_UNSUPPORTED_CURRENT_STATUS
data.value: The current subscription status does not allow add-on changes.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_ASSIGNED
data.value: The requested company already uses the selected commercial plan.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_COMPANY_NOT_ELIGIBLE
data.value: The company does not meet the minimum requirements to activate a subscription.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_COMPANY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested company could not be found.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRATION_BEFORE_START_DATE
data.value: The requested subscription expiration date cannot be earlier than the start date.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_INVALID_PERIODICITY
data.value: The requested subscription periodicity is invalid.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_INVALID_STATUS_REASON
data.value: The provided reason code is not valid for the requested status transition.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION
data.value: The requested subscription status transition is not allowed.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_MISSING_ADMINISTRATOR
data.value: The company requires at least one active owner or administrator before activating a subscription.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_MISSING_LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE
data.value: The company requires at least one active legal representative before activating a subscription.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested company subscription could not be found.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Only scheduled plan changes that are still pending can be cancelled.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_DATE_PAST_EXPIRATION
data.value: The requested effective date is not valid because the current subscription expires before that date.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN_PAST
data.value: The requested effective date cannot be in the past.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE_REQUIRED
data.value: A future effective date is required for the selected plan change mode.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_INVALID_MODE
data.value: The requested plan change mode is invalid.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested subscription plan change could not be found.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_PENDING_CONFLICT
data.value: The company already has a scheduled plan change pending application.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_SAME_PLAN_VERSION
data.value: The requested change does not modify the effective plan or version.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_CHANGE_UNSUPPORTED_CURRENT_STATUS
data.value: The current subscription status does not allow plan changes.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_INACTIVE
data.value: Only active commercial plans can be assigned to companies.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested commercial plan could not be found.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN_VERSION_NOT_AVAILABLE
data.value: The selected commercial plan does not have an effective version for the requested start date.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_REACTIVATION_PAST_EXPIRATION
data.value: The requested subscription can no longer be reactivated because it is already past its expiration date.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_REACTIVATION_REQUIRES_SUSPENDED_STATUS
data.value: Only suspended subscriptions can be reactivated.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_SCHEDULED_CONFLICT
data.value: The company already has a scheduled subscription pending activation.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE_IN_PAST
data.value: The requested subscription start date cannot be in the past.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN_PAST
data.value: The requested status change effective date cannot be in the past.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_DATE_REQUIRED
data.value: An effective date is required for subscription reactivation.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CHANGE_PENDING_CONFLICT
data.value: The subscription already has a scheduled status change pending application.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CHANGE_SCHEDULING_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Only suspended to active reactivation can be scheduled in this version.

data.name: PLATFORM_OPERATOR_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: The user is already linked to a platform operator.

data.name: PLATFORM_OPERATOR_USER_MUST_BE_ACTIVE_LOCAL
data.value: Platform operators must be linked to an active local user.

data.name: PLATFORM_OPERATOR_USER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested user could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_CATEGORY_CLASSIFICATION_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another classification already uses the requested code.

data.name: POSITION_CATEGORY_CLASSIFICATION_DUPLICATE_AXES
data.value: A classification with the same function, contract and hierarchy already exists.

data.name: POSITION_CATEGORY_CLASSIFICATION_IN_USE
data.value: The classification cannot be inactivated while it is in use.

data.name: POSITION_CATEGORY_CLASSIFICATION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested position category classification could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_CATEGORY_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another position category already uses the requested code.

data.name: POSITION_CATEGORY_IN_USE
data.value: The category cannot be inactivated while it is in use.

data.name: POSITION_CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested position category could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_DESCRIPTION_CATALOG_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another catalog item already uses the requested code.

data.name: POSITION_DESCRIPTION_CATALOG_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access position description catalogs.

data.name: POSITION_DESCRIPTION_CATALOG_INVALID_TYPE
data.value: Unsupported catalog type for the requested operation.

data.name: POSITION_DESCRIPTION_CATALOG_IN_USE
data.value: The catalog item cannot be inactivated while it is in use.

data.name: POSITION_DESCRIPTION_CATALOG_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested position description catalog item could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_DESCRIPTION_CATALOG_RELATED_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: A required related catalog item could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: POSITION_SLOTS_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access position slot administration.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_CAPACITY_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: Occupied employees must be between zero and max employees.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another position slot already uses the requested code.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_CONTRACT_TYPE_NOT_RESOLVED
data.value: The selected job profile does not resolve to an active contract type.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_COST_CENTER_INVALID
data.value: The cost center inferred from the job profile organization unit does not exist or is inactive for the company.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_DEPENDENCY_CYCLE
data.value: The requested direct dependency would create a cycle.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_DEPENDENCY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected dependency position slot could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_DEPENDENCY_SELF_REFERENCE
data.value: A position slot cannot depend on itself.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_DIAGRAM_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported diagram export format.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_EFFECTIVE_DATES_INVALID
data.value: Effective date range is invalid.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_EXPORT_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported export format.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_JOB_PROFILE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected job profile could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_JOB_PROFILE_ORG_UNIT_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: The selected job profile does not have an organization unit configured.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The position slot could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_ROLE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected role could not be found.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_STATUS_CONFLICT
data.value: The requested status change is not allowed for the current occupancy.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_SUSPENDED_OCCUPANCY_CONFLICT
data.value: Suspended position slots cannot update occupancy.

data.name: POSITION_SLOT_WORK_CENTER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected work center could not be found.

data.name: RBAC_DENIED
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: REPORT_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access the requested report resource.

data.name: REPORT_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: The requested report format is not supported.

data.name: REPORT_NOT_AVAILABLE
data.value: Reporting is not available for the requested resource.

data.name: REQUIREMENT_TYPE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested requirement type could not be found.

data.name: RESOURCE_ACTION_FORBIDDEN_BY_STATE
data.value: The requested action is not allowed for the current resource state.

data.name: RESOURCE_ACTION_FORBIDDEN_BY_TYPE
data.value: The requested action is not allowed for this resource type.

data.name: RESOURCE_DELETE_BLOCKED_BY_DEPENDENCIES
data.value: The resource cannot be deleted because it has active dependencies.

data.name: RESOURCE_IN_USE
data.value: The competency conduct cannot be inactivated while it is associated to active job profile expectations.

data.name: SALARY_CLASS_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested salary class could not be found.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_AMOUNT_RULE_VIOLATION
data.value: The salary amount rules are invalid for the requested operation.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_APPROVAL_POLICY_VIOLATION
data.value: The approval policy does not allow this operation.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_EFFECTIVE_DATES_INVALID
data.value: The effective date range is invalid.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_EFFECTIVE_DATE_OVERLAP
data.value: Another salary tabulator line already covers the requested effective date range.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_EXPORT_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported export format.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access salary tabulator administration.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_LINE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested salary tabulator line could not be found.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_REQUEST_ITEM_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one request item is required.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_REQUEST_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested salary tabulator change request could not be found.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_REQUEST_STATE_CONFLICT
data.value: The requested operation is invalid for the current request state.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_SALARY_CLASS_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested salary class could not be found or is inactive.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another system catalog item already uses the requested code for that country.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_COUNTRY_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN
data.value: Changing the country of an existing system catalog item is not supported.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_COUNTRY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Country '{0}' is not active.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The system catalog item could not be found.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_PARENT_COUNTRY_MISMATCH
data.value: The selected parent department belongs to a different country.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_PARENT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested parent department could not be found.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_PARENT_REQUIRED
data.value: This catalog requires a parent department.

data.name: TENANT_MISMATCH
data.value: The requested resource does not belong to the current tenant.

data.name: UNAUTHENTICATED
data.value: Authentication is required to access this resource.

data.name: USER_PREFERENCE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The user preferences could not be found.

data.name: WORK_CENTERS_ALLOWED_ONLY_ON_LAST_LEVEL
data.value: Only the last active location level can allow work centers.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_ADDRESS_REQUIRED
data.value: Address is required for the selected work center type.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another work center already uses the requested code.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_GEO_REQUIRED
data.value: Latitude and longitude are required for the selected work center type.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_HAS_ACTIVE_DEPENDENCIES
data.value: The work center cannot be inactivated because it still has active dependencies.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_INVALID_COORDINATES
data.value: The provided latitude or longitude is outside the supported range.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The work center could not be found.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_TYPE_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another work center type already uses the requested code.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_TYPE_INACTIVE
data.value: The selected work center type is inactive.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_TYPE_IN_USE
data.value: The work center type cannot be inactivated because active work centers still use it.

data.name: WORK_CENTER_TYPE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The work center type could not be found.

data.name: WORK_CONDITION_TYPE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested work condition type could not be found.

data.name: account_companies.current_user.invalid
data.value: The current user context is invalid.

data.name: account_companies.user.not_found
data.value: The current user could not be resolved.

data.name: auth.external.email_link_not_allowed
data.value: The external account cannot be linked automatically to the existing user for this email.

data.name: auth.external.email_missing
data.value: The external provider did not return an email address.

data.name: auth.external.invalid_token
data.value: The external identity token is invalid.

data.name: auth.external.provider_configuration_invalid
data.value: The external provider is not configured correctly.

data.name: auth.external.provider_link_conflict
data.value: The user is already linked to a different external provider.

data.name: auth.external.provider_not_supported
data.value: The requested external provider is not supported.

data.name: auth.forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource.

data.name: auth.invitation.invalid_token
data.value: The invitation token is invalid or expired.

data.name: auth.login.invalid_credentials
data.value: The provided credentials are invalid.

data.name: auth.logout.invalid_current_user
data.value: The authenticated user context is invalid.

data.name: auth.refresh.invalid_token
data.value: The refresh token is invalid or expired.

data.name: auth.token_configuration_invalid
data.value: JWT token generation is not configured correctly.

data.name: auth.unauthorized
data.value: Authentication is required to access this resource.

data.name: auth.user_already_exists
data.value: A user with the same email already exists.

data.name: auth.user_not_active
data.value: The user account is not active.

data.name: common.conflict
data.value: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

data.name: common.not_found
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: common.too_many_requests
data.value: The request rate exceeded the allowed threshold.

data.name: common.unexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: common.validation
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: company_users.company.not_found
data.value: The current company could not be resolved.

data.name: company_users.current_user.invalid
data.value: The current user context is invalid.

data.name: company_users.last_admin_required
data.value: The company must keep at least one active administrator.

data.name: company_users.management.forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to manage company users.

data.name: company_users.module.disabled_by_plan
data.value: The current plan does not enable company user management.

data.name: company_users.reset_invitation.external_user_not_supported
data.value: Reset invitation is only available for local users.

data.name: company_users.role.not_found
data.value: The requested role was not found in the current company.

data.name: company_users.tenant.required
data.value: A tenant context is required to manage company users.

data.name: company_users.user.not_found
data.value: The requested company user was not found.

data.name: company_users.user_already_in_company
data.value: The user already belongs to the current company.

data.name: company_users.user_in_another_company
data.value: The user is already assigned to a different company.

data.name: iam.current_user.invalid
data.value: The current user context is invalid.

data.name: iam.field_permissions.resource_access_required
data.value: The target role must have screen access before field permissions can be configured.

data.name: iam.management.forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to manage identity access.

data.name: iam.module.disabled_by_plan
data.value: The current plan does not enable this module.

data.name: iam.permissions.code_conflict
data.value: A permission with the same code already exists in this tenant.

data.name: iam.permissions.collection_not_found
data.value: One or more requested permissions were not found.

data.name: iam.permissions.not_found
data.value: The requested permission was not found.

data.name: iam.roles.collection_not_found
data.value: One or more requested roles were not found.

data.name: iam.roles.in_use
data.value: Roles with assigned users cannot be deleted.

data.name: iam.roles.last_administrator_required
data.value: The tenant must keep at least one active administrator.

data.name: iam.roles.name_conflict
data.value: A role with the same name already exists in this tenant.

data.name: iam.roles.not_found
data.value: The requested role was not found.

data.name: iam.roles.protected_role.delete_forbidden
data.value: Protected system roles cannot be deleted.

data.name: iam.roles.protected_role.forbidden
data.value: Protected system roles cannot be modified.

data.name: iam.tenant.required
data.value: A tenant context is required to access identity administration.

data.name: iam.users.collection_not_found
data.value: One or more requested users were not found.

data.name: iam.users.email_conflict
data.value: A user with the same email already exists in this tenant.

data.name: iam.users.not_found
data.value: The requested user was not found.

data.name: model.body.invalid
data.value: The request body is invalid.

data.name: model.body.required
data.value: The request body is required.

data.name: model.value.bool
data.value: The value must be true or false.

data.name: model.value.datetime
data.value: The value must be a valid date or date-time.

data.name: model.value.int
data.value: The value must be a valid integer.

data.name: model.value.invalid
data.value: The value is invalid for this field.

data.name: model.value.number
data.value: The value must be a valid number.

data.name: model.value.uuid
data.value: The value must be a valid UUID.

data.name: provisioning.country_not_found
data.value: The requested country '{0}' does not exist in the active country catalog.

data.name: provisioning.default_plan_unavailable
data.value: The default FREE commercial plan is not available for provisioning.

data.name: provisioning.failed
data.value: Initial company provisioning failed.

data.name: provisioning.initial_legal_representative_required
data.value: An initial active legal representative is required to create the company.

data.name: provisioning.user_not_found
data.value: The user to provision was not found.

data.name: validation.message.an_external_provider_is_required
data.value: An external provider is required.

data.name: validation.message.approvedsubjects_cannot_be_greater_than_totalsubjects
data.value: ApprovedSubjects cannot be greater than TotalSubjects.

data.name: validation.message.assignedpositionslotpublicid_is_not_allowed_for_candidate_personnel_files
data.value: AssignedPositionSlotPublicId is not allowed for candidate personnel files.

data.name: validation.message.assignedpositionslotpublicid_is_required_for_employee_personnel_files
data.value: AssignedPositionSlotPublicId is required for employee personnel files.

data.name: validation.message.at_least_one_of_speaks_writes_or_reads_must_be_true
data.value: At least one of Speaks, Writes, or Reads must be true.

data.name: validation.message.base_monthly_fee_cannot_exceed_2_decimal_places
data.value: Base monthly fee cannot exceed 2 decimal places.

data.name: validation.message.birthcountrycode_format_is_invalid
data.value: BirthCountryCode format is invalid.

data.value: BirthMunicipalityCode format is invalid.

data.value: Category format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.code_format_is_invalid
data.value: Code format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.commercial_add_on_module_keys_cannot_contain_duplicates
data.value: Commercial add-on module keys cannot contain duplicates.

data.name: validation.message.commercial_addon_code_format_is_invalid
data.value: Commercial addon code format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.commercial_addon_pricing_configuration_is_inconsistent_with_the_selected_type_and_billing_model
data.value: Commercial addon pricing configuration is inconsistent with the selected type and billing model.

data.name: validation.message.commercial_plan_code_format_is_invalid
data.value: Commercial plan code format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.commercial_plan_limits_cannot_contain_duplicate_codes
data.value: Commercial plan limits cannot contain duplicate codes.

data.name: validation.message.commercial_plan_module_keys_cannot_contain_duplicates
data.value: Commercial plan module keys cannot contain duplicates.

data.name: validation.message.company_name_contains_invalid_characters
data.value: Company name contains invalid characters.

data.name: validation.message.companyphone_format_is_invalid
data.value: CompanyPhone format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.country_code_must_be_a_2_or_3_letter_iso_style_code
data.value: Country code must be a 2 or 3 letter ISO-style code.

data.name: validation.message.country_contains_invalid_characters
data.value: Country contains invalid characters.

data.name: validation.message.createdfromutc_cannot_be_greater_than_createdtoutc
data.value: CreatedFromUtc cannot be greater than CreatedToUtc.

data.name: validation.message.currencycode_must_be_a_3_letter_iso_code
data.value: CurrencyCode must be a 3-letter ISO code.

data.name: validation.message.documentnumber_format_is_invalid
data.value: DocumentNumber format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.effectivefromutc_cannot_be_greater_than_effectivetoutc
data.value: EffectiveFromUtc cannot be greater than EffectiveToUtc.

data.name: validation.message.effectivefromutc_must_be_less_than_or_equal_to_effectivetoutc
data.value: EffectiveFromUtc must be less than or equal to EffectiveToUtc.

data.name: validation.message.effectivetoutc_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_effectivefromutc
data.value: EffectiveToUtc must be greater than or equal to EffectiveFromUtc.

data.name: validation.message.employercontributionaccountcode_format_is_invalid
data.value: EmployerContributionAccountCode format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.enddate_is_required_when_iscurrentlystudying_is_false
data.value: EndDate is required when IsCurrentlyStudying is false.

data.name: validation.message.filedata_is_required
data.value: FileData is required.

data.name: validation.message.limit_code_format_is_invalid
data.value: Limit code format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.limit_value_cannot_exceed_2_decimal_places

data.value: MaritalStatusCode format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.measurement_unit_is_required
data.value: Measurement unit is required.

data.name: validation.message.minage_cannot_be_greater_than_maxage

data.name: validation.message.minimum_monthly_fee_cannot_exceed_2_decimal_places

data.name: validation.message.occupiedemployees_must_be_less_than_or_equal_to_maxemployees

data.name: validation.message.role_ids_must_be_unique
data.value: Role ids must be unique.

data.value: Source contains invalid characters.

data.name: validation.message.the_from_date_must_be_less_than_or_equal_to_to

data.name: validation.message.the_requested_format_is_not_compatible_with_the_selected_resource
data.value: The requested format is not compatible with the selected resource.

data.name: validation.message.unit_price_cannot_exceed_2_decimal_places
data.value: Unit price cannot exceed 2 decimal places.

data.value: Unknown commercial module key.

data.name: validation.message.unknown_entity_type
data.value: Unknown entity type.

data.name: validation.message.unknown_event_type
data.value: Unknown event type.

data.name: validation.message.unsupported_catalog_type
data.value: Unsupported catalog type.

data.name: validation.message.workphone_format_is_invalid
data.value: WorkPhone format is invalid.

data.name: JOB_PROFILE_COMPENSATION_TABULATOR_LINE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The selected salary tabulator line is not active for the profile effective date.

data.name: SALARY_TABULATOR_JOB_PROFILE_COVERAGE_CONFLICT
data.value: The operation would leave one or more job profiles without salary tabulator coverage for their compensation reference.

data.name: REPORT_EXPORT_TOO_LARGE
data.value: The export is too large to generate synchronously. Use an asynchronous report export job.

data.name: REPORT_EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
data.value: The report export exceeds the configured row limit.

data.name: REPORT_EXPORT_JOB_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The report export job was not found.

data.name: REPORT_EXPORT_JOB_NOT_READY
data.value: The report export job is not ready for download.

data.name: REPORT_EXPORT_JOB_EXPIRED
data.value: The report export artifact has expired.

data.name: REPORT_EXPORT_STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: Report export storage is not configured.

data.name: validation.message.format_is_not_supported
data.value: Format is not supported.

data.name: validation.message.parameters_must_be_a_valid_json_object
data.value: Parameters must be a valid JSON object.

data.name: validation.message.resourcekey_is_not_supported_for_report_exports
data.value: ResourceKey is not supported for report exports.

data.name: validation.message.a_salary_tabulator_line_or_salary_class_reference_is_required_for_compensation
data.value: A salary tabulator line or salary class reference is required for compensation.

data.name: validation.message.competencyid_competencytypeid_and_behaviorlevelid_must_be_provided_together
data.value: CompetencyId, CompetencyTypeId and BehaviorLevelId must be provided together.

data.name: auth.password_reset.invalid_token
data.value: The password reset token is invalid or expired.

data.name: auth.password_reset.password_policy_violation
data.value: The new password does not meet the password policy.

data.name: validation.message.a_maximum_of_10_social_links_is_allowed
data.value: A maximum of 10 social links is allowed.

data.name: validation.message.effectivetoutc_cannot_be_less_than_effectivefromutc
data.value: EffectiveToUtc cannot be less than EffectiveFromUtc.

data.name: validation.message.provider_code_format_is_invalid
data.value: Provider code format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.provider_codes_must_be_unique
data.value: Provider codes must be unique.

data.name: validation.message.url_must_be_an_absolute_https_url
data.value: Url must be an absolute https URL.

data.name: BANK_CATALOG_ALREADY_ACTIVE
data.value: The bank catalog item is already active.

data.name: BANK_CATALOG_ALREADY_INACTIVE
data.value: The bank catalog item is already inactive.

data.name: BANK_CATALOG_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another bank catalog item already uses the requested code for that country.

data.name: BANK_CATALOG_COMPANY_COUNTRY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The company country could not be resolved for bank catalog lookup.

data.name: BANK_CATALOG_COUNTRY_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN
data.value: Changing the country of an existing bank catalog item is not supported.

data.name: BANK_CATALOG_COUNTRY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Country '{0}' is not active.

data.name: BANK_CATALOG_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested bank catalog item could not be found.

data.name: validation.message.filedata_is_required_for_new_documents
data.value: File data is required when creating a new document.

data.name: files.not_found
data.value: The requested file was not found.

data.name: files.not_active
data.value: The file is not in an active state.

data.name: files.not_pending_upload
data.value: The file is not pending upload.

data.name: files.ownership_mismatch
data.value: You do not own this file.

data.name: files.tenant_mismatch
data.value: The file does not belong to your organization.

data.name: files.provider_not_configured
data.value: The storage provider is not configured.

data.name: files.purpose_not_configured
data.value: No rules are configured for the specified file purpose.

data.name: files.too_large
data.value: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size.

data.name: files.content_type_not_allowed
data.value: The content type is not allowed for this purpose.

data.name: files.extension_not_allowed
data.value: The file extension is not allowed for this purpose.

data.name: files.upload_not_found
data.value: The uploaded file was not found in storage. The upload may have failed or the session expired.

data.name: files.invalid_purpose
data.value: The specified value is not a valid file purpose.

data.name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_CATALOG_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested document type catalog item could not be found.

data.name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_CATALOG_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another document type catalog item already uses the requested code.

data.name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_CATALOG_ITEM_IN_USE
data.value: The document type catalog item is in use and cannot be inactivated.

data.name: validation.message.filename_and_contenttype_are_required_when_replacing_the_file
data.value: FileName and ContentType are required when replacing the file.

data.name: EDUCATION_CATALOG_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested education catalog item could not be found.

data.name: EDUCATION_CATALOG_CODE_CONFLICT
data.value: Another education catalog item already uses the requested code.

data.name: EDUCATION_CATALOG_ITEM_IN_USE
data.value: The education catalog item is in use and cannot be inactivated.

data.name: PERSONNEL_FILE_ITEM_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested item could not be found in this personnel file.

data.name: PLATFORM_COMPANY_SUBSCRIPTION_CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT
data.value: The subscription was modified by another process. Please reload and try again.

data.name: REPORT_CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT
data.value: The report was modified by another process. Please reload and try again.

data.name: files.concurrency_conflict
data.value: The file was modified by another process. Please reload and try again.
